first_dialog: BEEP BOOP BOP. HELLO I AM GARDENBOT HOW MAY I ASSIST YOU?
THOSE ARE A BREED OF AZURE FUNGAL FLOWERS FROM THE FUNGAL RAINFORESTS OF ALDORIA. WHILE THEY CAN BE AGGRESSIVE AT TIMES, THEY ARE HIGHLY VALUED FOR THEIR BEAUTY AND MEDICINAL PROPERTIES.
HOWEVER, THESE FLOWERS ARE FRAGILE AND DO NOT LIKE HUMAN CONTACT, SO I AM ASKING YOU TO PLEASE KEEP YOUR DISTANCE AND NOT TOUCH ANYTHING.
POTENTIAL THREAT DETECTED. ACTIVATING DEFENSE SUBROUTINES...
DEACTIVATING DEFENSE SUBROUTINES. REACTIVATING GARDENING PROTOCOLS. RETURNING TO WORK...
player_dialog: Can you tell me about those flowers over there?
possible_dialog: BEEP BOOP BOP. SORRY, MY PRIMARY DIRECTIVE RIGHT NOW IS TO MAINTAIN THIS GARDEN, PLEASE COME BACK LATER IF YOU NEED ASSISTANCE WITH OTHER TASKS.
